title: Resolution Commending and Congratulating the Los Baños Arnis Team for Being Part of the Laguna Arnis Team to Compete in the 1st Mayor Kuya Mark Alcala National Arnis Invitational Championship to Be Held at Pacific Mall, Lucena City on August 19,2022. (AUTHOR(S) : Councilors Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap, Miko C. Pelegrina, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Julius A. Moli?awe, Benedicto S. Alborida, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Arlene P. Delos Santos, Jozylyn N. Manansala, 08/15/2022)
